zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barsham於1588年12月8日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可爾吉可時，他的父親William Barsham30歲，母親Anne Yelverton28歲。他於大約1634年與Annabella Smith alias Bland在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1684年7月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年95歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barsham于1588年12月8日出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可可爾吉可时，他的父亲William Barsham30岁，母亲Anne Yelverton28岁。他于大约1634年与Annabella Smith alias Bland在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1684年7月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年95岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Barsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North, East, or West Barsham (Norfolk), or from Barsham (Suffolk).

variants.name: Basson
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Basso, based on the element bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’.
German: of French (Huguenot) origin (see 2 above). This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Basham
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Barsham, a habitational name from any of the places in Norfolk and Suffolk called Barsham, from the genitive case of the Old English byname Bār ‘wild boar’ + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave in the memorials list

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Barsham was born on 8 December 1588, in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Barsham, was 30 and his mother, Anne Yelverton, was 28. He married Annabella Smith alias Bland about 1634, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 July 1684, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 95, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barsham est né le 8 décembre 1588, à Colkirk, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Barsham, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Yelverton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Smith alias Bland environ 1634, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1684, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barsham am 8. Dezember 1588 in Colkirk, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Barsham 30 und seine Mutter Anne Yelverton 28. Er hat um 1634 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Annabella Smith alias Bland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juli 1684 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barsham è nato il il 8 dicembre 1588 nel Colkirk, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Barsham, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anne Yelverton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Annabella Smith alias Bland circa 1634, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1684, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Barshamが1588年12月8日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクコルキルクで生まれた時，父William Barshamは30歳，母Anne Yelvertonは28歳であった。約1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでAnnabella Smith alias Blandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1684年7月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで95歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Barsham(이)가 1588년 12월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 코커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Barsham(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Yelverton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1634년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Annabella Smith alias Bland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1684년 7월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.8 December 1588–3 July 1684: 8 de dezembro de 1588–3 de julho de 1684

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Barsham nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1588, em Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Barsham, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Yelverton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabella Smith alias Bland aproximadamente 1634, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1684, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barsham родился 8 декабря 1588 г. в местности колкирк, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Barsham было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Yelverton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Smith alias Bland около 1634 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 июля 1684 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Barsham nació el 8 de diciembre de 1588, en Colkirk, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Barsham, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Yelverton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Annabella Smith alias Bland aproximadamente 1634, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1684, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
